source_old_req: Assume that the sensor input data, specifically the gyroscope data sensored_attitude and the sun sensor data sun_direction, are within the valid physical range of spacecraft attitude and angular velocity. Guarantee that the actuator command outputs reference_torque and reference_force are strictly limited within the maximum output envelope of the associated hardware to prevent actuator saturation. Guarantee that the system outputs the command to switch to safe mode (Forcing_Safe_Mode or Getting_Back_To_Normal_Mode) only when an explicit fault event is triggered. In the implementation layer AOCSprocessing.others, define internal state variables to represent the system's state machine with normal mode mode_NM and safe mode mode_SM. Establish verification lemmas in the implementation layer to ensure that under safe mode (mode_SM), the output control flows of threads OCF, FR, and ME are safely truncated or forcibly zeroed, and that the data pass-through logic between internal thread ports and external event ports is accurately mapped through structured assignment.
natural_requirement: The AOCSprocessing component shall define the implementation-level signal routing for AOCSprocessing.others. In the implementation layer, AOCSprocessing.others shall route signal flow from TCP.nominal_attitude to ACF.nominal_attitude through Cnx1 and signal flow from TCP.nominal_orbit to OCF.nominal_orbit through Cnx2.

requirement_items.text: The AOCSprocessing.others implementation shall route the signal flow from TCP.nominal_attitude to ACF.nominal_attitude through connection Cnx1.
requirement_items.source_text_before_behavior_style_rewrit: The AOCSprocessing.others implementation shall declare connection Cnx1 from TCP.nominal_attitude to ACF.nominal_attitude.

requirement_items.text: The AOCSprocessing.others implementation shall route the signal flow from TCP.nominal_orbit to OCF.nominal_orbit through connection Cnx2.
requirement_items.source_text_before_behavior_style_rewrit: The AOCSprocessing.others implementation shall declare connection Cnx2 from TCP.nominal_orbit to OCF.nominal_orbit.

quality_policy.traceable: Every item has trace_refs and expected_check metadata tied to AADL facts.
quality_policy.principle: Every generated sentence must name an explicit property assignment or structural connection; ordinary feature declarations are not used as rebuilt requirements.

natural_requirement_before_behavior_styl: The AOCSprocessing.others implementation shall declare connection Cnx1 from TCP.nominal_attitude to ACF.nominal_attitude. The AOCSprocessing.others implementation shall declare connection Cnx2 from TCP.nominal_orbit to OCF.nominal_orbit.

behavior_style_policy.basis: front-110 AGREE-derived requirements favor implementable behavior, constants, assumptions, guarantees, routing, and bounded properties.
behavior_style_policy.rule: Do not describe unsupported validity/legal-boundary semantics unless the AADL model exposes variables, values, or properties that can implement them.

natural_requirement_before_paragraph_rew: The AOCSprocessing.others implementation shall route the signal flow from TCP.nominal_attitude to ACF.nominal_attitude through connection Cnx1. The AOCSprocessing.others implementation shall route the signal flow from TCP.nominal_orbit to OCF.nominal_orbit through connection Cnx2.

paragraph_style_policy.rule: Req.txt is written as a natural-language requirement paragraph; per-item traceability stays in requirement_items.
paragraph_style_policy.basis: Front-110 AGREE-derived requirements generally combine function, assumptions, guarantees, and implementation notes into 1-4 sentence paragraphs.
